description: Overall my experience with Grepsr has been very positive. It is a dependable solution for large scale and recurring data extraction. The platform reduces operational overhead and lets teams focus on analysis instead of data collection. Communication and support are strong. I would recommend it for teams that value stability and accuracy.
author: Aditya M.
pros: What I liked most about Grepsr is the reliability of the data and the consistency of delivery. The support team is very responsive and proactive when issues arise. It removes the need for building and maintaining complex scraping infrastructure. Data quality remains high even when source websites change. Overall it saves significant engineering time.
cons: What I liked least is the limited hands on control for deep customization. Advanced changes or new logic usually require coordination with the Grepsr team. Turnaround time for complex updates can sometimes take longer than expected. It may feel restrictive for teams that want full ownership of scraping logic.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Grepsr is great for our data mining needs
description: Grepsr is fantastic at data extraction and provides excellent value for money spent. They can do large-scale data pulls with a timely turnaround. We have been using them for years and they remember our criteria and requests have become pretty turnkey.
author: Kate P.
pros: Great data extraction services. Excellent value for money spent. Timely turnaround. They remember repeating criteria and apply it.
cons: I have no complaints about their service! We rarely have to send files back to adjust and the service team is always helpful.

author: Margaret O.
pros: It was helpful because I couldn't access the resources online without the help of a scraping service.
cons: I think data should be free. Also it was a bit confusing at times to be able to access the data once it was scraped.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Eddie B.
pros: The team at Grepsr took time to understand our data needs and build a solution that worked for us, ensuring that data is complete and accurate every time.
cons: Grepsr could benefit from building-out additional self-serve features on their platforms to make changes to projects and tasks such as data cleansing workflows.

description: Love working with the team. They take all feedback seriously and provide rapid solutions.
author: Aditi P.
pros: - Articulate and clear in interactions - Timely in responses and follow-up - Adept at rapid issue resolution - Welcomes and implements feedback for continuous improvement
cons: Grepsr is doing amazing. I love all the new improvements they have been making.

review_title: A Great Product and Great Team
description: Great product, great support response times.
author: Trevor A.
pros: I like how we are able to pull thousands of lines of data quickly and efficiently.
cons: The current report configuration is giving us too many lines for all the sellers, but our team will work to fix this.

description: Grepsr are a very well run professional outfit across both technical and account management. We have pretty demanding needs and a huge volume of data. The quality and consistency of the output is great. Overall an excellent supplier.
author: Shane O.
pros: Excellent account services team and consistent quality of technical delivery. We have a very diverse need and require a fair amount of tailored work. Things are delivered to schedule and we get early warning if there have been any quality control checks that required reprocessing well in advance the odd time it happens. The teams are very receptive when any problems occasionally arise.
cons: No real negatives. The work is complex so occasionally we have caught issues in acceptance testing the custom code created specifically for us. But the speed of correction has been excellent.

description: My experience with Grespr has been a very positive one. It is great to work with a team that is so customer centric and willing to provide solutions.
author: John B.
pros: [sensitive content hidden] are very reactive to our needs and finding solutions to help support our business.
cons: At the moment I do not have any to speak of.

review_title: Greps lets us keep our product catalog data under control
author: Kasia T.
pros: The collaboration with Grepsr until this point has been smooth and very professional. They are attentive to details, flexible and quick with their actions which makes our work way easier and more effective. They always do their best to accommodate our needs and requests. We are also satisfied with the communication we have, they respond to questions and comments immediately. Thanks to this we can keep the product catalog containing hundreds of thousands of products accurate and up to date.
cons: Nothing really, sometimes we encounter some little issues with product files but it's expected with the volume of data that we process. Also they are being fixed quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Communication and Understanding of My Needs
author: Danye W.
pros: Communication was smooth and straightforward, and my sales representative was always quick to respond. They took the time to fully understand my needs and provided solutions that fit perfectly. Overall, a reliable and professional team to work with.
cons: Honestly, nothing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Rebecca S.
pros: Grepsr's team has always been extremely helpful and responsive. They are understanding of our needs and work diligently to provide suitable solutions within their services. Any time that I have a new project, the team is great at understanding the need and creating a plan to implement. Additionally, the pricing is very straight forward and customizable, based on your needs and budget.
cons: As with most web-scraping services, there are issues that arise with the daily data scraping in incorrectly. However, the team is quick to help resolve these issues.

description: My experience with Grepsr, overall, has been very positive. Our company uses Grepsr for data extraction. The reports are used for data insight within the industry. If we encounter a problem with the tool or the report Grepsr is responds very quickly and provides a solution. Not only do the provide a solution quickly, but they implement quickly as well. I would highly recommend Grepsr for all your data and web extraction needs.
author: Jill T.
pros: Ease of use Very responsive Turnaround time is quick Provides answers/solutions in a timely manner
cons: Extraction data was incorrect (most of the time not Grepsr's fault) Incorrect sku count on report vs website

description: A truly wonderful experience from setup to implementation to using it everyday.
author: Shawn H.
pros: I love the ease of use and essentially the auto-pilot functionality
cons: Sometimes the formatting comes through that leads to a few minutes of excel tweaks. I'm sure if I raised concern it would be fixed in two minutes.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I run a small business part of which entails the collecting of data on a daily basis, before coming across Grepsr this was a time consuming onerous task. Now I need do no more than simply open the file to access all my data requirements. It is a very cost effective means of obtaining data and the service provided is without doubt the best of any software company I have dealt with in my 25-years of experience
author: Peter M.
pros: The set up was very straight forward thanks to the assistance of the staff I would like to express my gratitude to customer service representative in particular whose assistance has been invaluable
cons: I can honestly say that in my 5-years experience with the software I cannot find anything I would change

description: Grepsr has allowed us to gather thousands of points of data in a very quick and accurate manner. They are a great partner!
author: Matt A.
pros: Grepsr always provides a quick turnaround on our requests and the data is formatted just as we've asked.
cons: Grepsr does what we ask of them. Nothing negative to say.

description: Overall positive experience. Strategic partners to help with data needs. Extremely passionate team who are responsive to out business needs.
author: Aditya K.
pros: Quick turnaround, reasonable pricing, great quality
cons: No negative experience to fill in while working with Grepsr

review_title: Gets the job done, on time
author: Preriit S.
pros: Have been working with Grepsr team for almost 4 years. Customer service team is very helpful, timely and understanding.
cons: Grepsr is on a costlier end compared to other vendors but they are reliable so that's a good point versus others who are cheaper but not at all reliable.

description: Customer service has been great. They are very helpful getting the information you need.
author: Lance H.
pros: The Grespr service makes gathering and processing information extremely easy. Saves a lot of time and has helped build key data sets.
cons: At times the output comes out incorrectly or misses information.

description: Had a positive experience working with their team. They were able to tailor some of the data templates and delivery for our business, at a small cost. Although it involved multiple iterations with some QC errors and back-and-forth, was satisfied with the end results.
author: Allen K.
pros: -easy to use google form to queue data pulls -quick turnaround on requests -communicative and helpful management -reasonable pricing model -Flexible and cooperative in terms of refining product for business needs
cons: -occasional QA missteps created extra work on part of team -occasional QC errors in reading request specifics (custom request language ignored and returned a generic pull, for example)

author: Spencer C.
pros: Grepsr supplied me with nice clean data exactly to my specifications. I hope to use the service again soon.
cons: Nothing negative to comment on. Haven’t used all the features though.

author: Tobias K.
pros: Grepsr works well, reasonably priced. I used their custom build option and they've been sending me the data on a daily basis
cons: They quoted me a price and did charge extra later for something they missed during their initial quote
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Roman N.
pros: Grepsr's prompt and flexible approach to accommodating our data requirements greatly impressed us, facilitating seamless integration into our marketing strategies.
cons: Overall, I find Grepsr's services well-suited to our needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great costumer support when its needed
author: Bergur E.
pros: They are fast to reply, and fast to fix any problem we have had with changing design on we website we are scraping from.
cons: I havent had any problems using grepsr..

author: Geovane R.
pros: Easy to use, excellent service and no delay at delivery.
cons: Failed to scraping webmotors.

author: Zach P.
pros: Quick, high quality and useful leads/data extracts.
cons: Nothing - absolutely love the service and support.
